examples: The best part of working with him, though, was strictly gastronomical鈥攁ll the French fries and hamburgers I could eat.
Friday will bring a 5.5-mile run, the extra half-mile my grueling expiation of any gastronomical indulgences during the week.
Mrs. McCaskey dodged in time. She reached for a flat-iron, with which, as a sort of cordial, she hoped to bring the gastronomical duel to a close.
Blue Hill continues to move up toward the gastronomical summit.
